dialogue_text: Send me back to Kansas, where my Aunt Em and Uncle Henry are,
source_excerpt: "Send me back to Kansas, where my Aunt Em and Uncle Henry are," she answered earnestly. "I don't like your country, although it is so beautiful. And I am sure Aunt Em will be dreadfully worried over my being away so long."
